error-recovery.objective: Handle runtime errors during workflow execution

handler.action: Report which file is missing and its expected path
Ask user to provide the correct path or create the file
Retry the step after user provides the file
Report the variable name and where it was expected
HALT execution — do not guess or use defaults
Report which validation check failed and why
Retry the step once with user correction
If retry also fails: HALT with full error details
Report which gate failed (pre_start or post_complete)
Report the specific check condition that failed
